name: My Employer Says They Won't File My Injury Report—Now What?

step.name: Step 1
step.text: First, tell your supervisor exactly what happened immediately. Seek medical attention right away and be specific with the doctor about how the work injury occurred. Once you've seen a pro, notify the insurance carrier yourself if your boss stalls. If things get complicated or your claim is denied, it's time to call an expert. Dial 801-746-0290 for a free strategy session.

description: My Employer Says They Won't File My Injury Report—Now What? - Murray
